<!--
Thanks for contributing to Diecast! Please make sure each item below is
satisfied before requesting review.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Description** — short summary of what this PR does and why.
- [ ] **Linked issue** — `Closes #N`, `Refs #N`, or "no issue (rationale)".
- [ ] **Tests** — added or updated tests covering the change (or note why not).
- [ ] **Anonymization-lint passes** — `bin/lint-anonymization` returns 0
      locally and in CI.
- [ ] **Docs** — updated `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or relevant docs in
      the same PR if behavior changed.
